_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to craft indicators of operational progress/success.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identifying inefficiencies, designing automation opportunities, and measuring improvement outcomes.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.614), AI-T-020 (AI, cosine: 0.525).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.640). Shared vocabulary: [operational, skill]. DCWF-only terms [craft, indicators, progress, success] vs WIDAI-only terms [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.910, R=0.873). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill to craft indicators of operational progress/success." and "Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identify" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.619 ≈ STS 0.640 (gap 0.021). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [operational, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [operational, skill]. DCWF-only: [craft, indicators, progress, success]. WIDAI-only: [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement].
